name: Light Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
5. Let cool before slicing and serving.
